topic: Teeth whitening — before/after smile and Lewis structures
image_prompt: SVG before/after smile illustration (stained yellow teeth on the left, whitened teeth on the right) above four Lewis (dot-cross) structure options A–D for hydrogen peroxide: A H–O–O–H single bonds no lone pairs, B H–O=O–H double bond, C H–O–O–H with two lone pairs on each oxygen (correct answer), D incomplete lone pairs.
SVG four Lewis (dot-cross) structure options A–D for hydrogen peroxide; option C (H–O–O–H with two lone pairs on each oxygen, single O–O bond) is correct.
